name: references-update
description: 'Create or update a reference file for a language, framework, library, utility, or practice using the repository template conventions.'

user-invocable: true
---

# References Update

GitHub Copilot adapter for [`../../../skills/references-update/SKILL.md`](../../../skills/references-update/SKILL.md).

## When to use

- Adding a new framework or library reference
- Refreshing existing guidance after learning or migration
- Keeping shared references current and reusable

## Procedure

1. Identify the target category and existing source-of-truth material.
2. Reuse the established reference templates and tone.
3. Update the relevant `references/**/*.md` file with actionable, non-duplicated guidance.
4. Keep shared rules in shared files instead of repeating them.

## References

- [Source workflow](../../../skills/references-update/SKILL.md)
- [Reference templates](../../../skills/references-update/references/)
